topic: identifying fractions of a whole using circle models
latex: Which of the shaded regions below represents $\frac{3}{5}$ of the whole circle?
keep_mc_reason: Question asks 'which of the shaded regions below' requiring students to identify the correct diagram from the given options; removing choices would eliminate the core task.
diagram_notes: Four circles labeled A, B, C, D, each divided into 5 equal parts (shown with tick marks around the circumference). Circle A has 2 parts shaded. Circle B has 3 parts shaded (correct answer - represents 3/5). Circle C has 2 parts shaded. Circle D has 1 part shaded. All shading is gray and the circles have small tick marks on the outside edge to indicate the equal divisions.
